1.title: Total requests
1.query:
timeseries requests = avg(dt.runtime.go.http.requests),
  by: { dt.entity.process_group_instance }
| fieldsAdd process_group_instance_name = entityName(dt.entity.process_group_instance)
| sort arrayAvg(requests) desc
| limit 20

2.title: 5xx responses
2.query:
timeseries requests = avg(dt.runtime.go.http.requests),
  by: { dt.entity.process_group_instance }
| fieldsAdd process_group_instance_name = entityName(dt.entity.process_group_instance)
| sort arrayAvg(requests) desc
| limit 20
